list.name: Changes
list.comment: - added overlap-feature training dataset path from existing labelled CSV data - validated 30x24 sequence generation for deployment-safe model training - established final training input contract using existing dataset only

task.summary:
implement gaze tracking module wrapper using GazeFollower
- Added standardized GazeSample schema - implemented converter from GazeFollower gaze_info to internal format - created GazeTrackerModule wrapper with buffering and polling - added test script for standalone gaze module validation - established modular structure for gaze subsystem

implement gaze tracking module wrapper using GazeFollower
- Added standardized GazeSample schema - implemented converter from GazeFollower gaze_info to internal format - created GazeTrackerModule wrapper with buffering and polling - added test script for standalone gaze module validation - established modular structure for gaze subsystem

Add background gaze tracking service
- Added GazeTrackingService for continuous gaze polling in a background thread - Exposed latest sample and recent window accessors for downstream modules - Added package exports for gaze subsystem - Added standalone test script for live service validation

add turn-transition prediction model foundation
- define GazeWindow and TurnPrediction schemas - create abstract TurnPredictionModel interface - implement DummyTurnModel for pipeline testing - added test script integrating gaze service with prediction module

add gaze feature extraction pipeline for turn prediction
- added configurable feature extraction from GazeSample to per-frame vector - implemented GazeWindow to sequence conversion for model input - added optional first-order delta features for temporal dynamics - added feature extraction test script using live gaze service - added turn_prediction package exports

- validated saved turn-prediction checkpoint loading and metadata path - confirmed live inference blocker is training/live feature-space mismatch - established rich 30-feature checkpoint contract for next integration step

- extended live gaze wrapper to retain face-alignment data alongside gaze output - switched buffering path to subscriber-based face+gaze sample collection - validated live samples now include landmarks and eye-region rectangles

- added first-class live-native model contract for training and inference - aligned Transformer input size with 44-dimensional live feature schema - established dedicated dataset, training, and checkpoint path for live-native models

- added 24-dimensional dataset/live overlap feature schema for final model path - validated live overlap feature extraction with stable timestep vectors - established deployment-safe training target compatible with existing dataset

- added overlap-feature training dataset path from existing labelled CSV data - validated 30x24 sequence generation for deployment-safe model training - established final training input contract using existing dataset only

MESSAGE.value:
implement gaze tracking module wrapper using GazeFollower
- Added standardized GazeSample schema - implemented converter from GazeFollower gaze_info to internal format - created GazeTrackerModule wrapper with buffering and polling - added test script for standalone gaze module validation - established modular structure for gaze subsystem

Add background gaze tracking service
- Added GazeTrackingService for continuous gaze polling in a background thread - Exposed latest sample and recent window accessors for downstream modules - Added package exports for gaze subsystem - Added standalone test script for live service validation

add turn-transition prediction model foundation
- define GazeWindow and TurnPrediction schemas - create abstract TurnPredictionModel interface - implement DummyTurnModel for pipeline testing - added test script integrating gaze service with prediction module

add gaze feature extraction pipeline for turn prediction
- added configurable feature extraction from GazeSample to per-frame vector - implemented GazeWindow to sequence conversion for model input - added optional first-order delta features for temporal dynamics - added feature extraction test script using live gaze service - added turn_prediction package exports

- validated saved turn-prediction checkpoint loading and metadata path - confirmed live inference blocker is training/live feature-space mismatch - established rich 30-feature checkpoint contract for next integration step

- extended live gaze wrapper to retain face-alignment data alongside gaze output - switched buffering path to subscriber-based face+gaze sample collection - validated live samples now include landmarks and eye-region rectangles

- added first-class live-native model contract for training and inference - aligned Transformer input size with 44-dimensional live feature schema - established dedicated dataset, training, and checkpoint path for live-native models

- added 24-dimensional dataset/live overlap feature schema for final model path - validated live overlap feature extraction with stable timestep vectors - established deployment-safe training target compatible with existing dataset

- added overlap-feature training dataset path from existing labelled CSV data - validated 30x24 sequence generation for deployment-safe model training - established final training input contract using existing dataset only

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: - added overlap-feature training dataset path from existing labelled CSV data - validated 30x24 sequence generation for deployment-safe model training - established final training input contract using existing dataset only
